name: Plan Samli Daet Diao (Fried Sun-Dried Kingfish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and butterfly the kingfish, leaving the two sides joined along the belly.
2. Open the fish flat with the skin downward and remove the bones.
3. Score the flesh of the fish with a knife.
4. Allow the fish to dry completely.
5. Place the fish in direct sunlight for 5-6 hours, turning it regularly so both the skin side and interior are exposed to the sun.
6. Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
7. When the oil is hot, place the fish in the pan with the skin side down.
8. Fry until the lower side becomes crisp and golden, then turn the fish and continue frying until it is cooked through on both sides.
9. Remove the fish from the pan, drain, and serve on a platter.
10. Toss shallots, mango, chili, fish sauce, lime juice, and palm sugar in a bowl to create a seasoning mixture.
11. Serve the seasoning mixture with the fried fish.
Serves 2-3.
